detaileddescription.para: This file contains declarations specific to AMD's unique requirements and functionalities for xilffs. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 5.2 ht 10/10/23 Added code for versioning of library. 5.6 an 11/12/25 Update the FatFS version to R0.16
